steps.instruction: Scroll down to bottom of the page

steps.text: Set Customer Event Alias and wait until you can focus on the text input

steps.instruction: Scroll up to the top of the page
Scroll down until you see "See Requests"

steps.text: the first result at the top of the page that says "v2/event/custom" in the text

steps.instruction: if you see "customer_event_alias": "aliasExample" in the logs, succeed the test
